translation.echoTargetLanguageHint: If the peer is already speaking your language: repeat their speech (on) or stay silent (off)

key.heading: Step 1. Gemini API Key
key.desc: Enter your Gemini key to enable speech recognition and translation.
key.ready: Key is valid — you can continue

cable.heading: Step 2. VB-CABLE Virtual Cable
cable.desc: VB-CABLE is a virtual audio device that routes the translated speech into Zoom, WhatsApp, and other apps.
cable.detectedDesc: The virtual cable was detected. You can continue.
cable.installingHint: The VB-Audio installer will open. Click "Install Driver" and confirm the UAC prompt.
cable.errDownload: Failed to download VB-CABLE. Check your internet connection or download it manually.
cable.errNoInstaller: Installer not found in the archive. Try downloading manually.
cable.rebootHint: The cable isn't detected yet — a reboot may be required.

devices.heading: Step 3. Audio Devices
devices.desc: Choose your microphone and output device. Headphones are recommended to avoid echo.

test.heading: Step 4. Test
test.instruction: Say a phrase — you'll hear it translated into the peer's language.
test.zoomBody: In Zoom/WhatsApp, select the microphone: CABLE Output (VB-Audio Virtual Cable).
test.zoomNote: The translator must be running (the "Start" button on the main screen).

voice.title: Voice Messages
voice.emptyHint:
No voice messages yet.
Record a voice message with the Record button or drag and drop an audio file (.ogg, .mp3, .wav, etc.).
Drag the translated file into WhatsApp when ready.
voice.dragDisclaimer: Will arrive as an audio file, not a voice note

history.confirmClearBody: This will permanently delete all call transcripts and voice messages (including audio files).

live.transcriptEmpty: Transcript will appear here once the session starts
live.alertNoKeyDesc: Add a Gemini API key to start translation.
live.alertNoCableDesc: VB-CABLE virtual audio device is required for live translation.
live.alertEchoDesc: The selected output device does not look like headphones. Using speakers may cause echo.
live.costTooltip: Estimated cost at $0.023/min per direction (public preview pricing)

error.noApiKey: Add an API key in Settings
error.cableMissing: VB-CABLE not found — run Setup Wizard
error.noAppSelected: Select an app to capture first
